metadata.description: Open-source Claude Code plugins from NerdyQ for Microsoft Power Pages classic portals, optimized for the current enhanced-model workflow around native Power Pages Studio's hybrid Liquid + Web API pattern, plus safe pac paportal sync workflows and static-analysis security audit.

plugins.name: pp-portal
plugins.description: Microsoft Power Pages classic portals, the hybrid Liquid + Web API pattern. Server-rendered Liquid templates with client-side Web API calls in custom JS. Use for *.webpage.copy.html, *.webtemplate.source.html, *.webpage.custom_javascript.js, fetchxml, entitylist/entityform/webform, web roles, table permissions, and pac paportal. NOT for code sites (use Microsoft's power-pages plugin); for Dataverse-side work, defer to Microsoft's dataverse plugin.

plugins.name: pp-sync
plugins.description: Run Power Pages classic portal sync workflows safely: pac paportal download/upload, pac solution export/unpack, project-aware wrapper-script delegation, and bulk-upload safety guards.

plugins.name: pp-permissions-audit
plugins.description: Audit a Power Pages classic portal's Web Roles, Table Permissions, Site Settings, and Web API configuration for misalignments, orphaned permissions, missing site settings, exposed fields, broken polymorphic lookups, and security gaps.
